raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the context","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Nina?","description":"Safe opener that lets Nina choose the main thread before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-sprint load","name":"Now that the sprint pressure has eased, what’s actually driving your workload right now?","description":"Separates temporary push from a pattern in her current pace.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work that lingers","name":"What work are you still carrying forward that no longer feels worth the effort?","description":"Surfaces inherited tasks or momentum work that should probably be dropped.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where does your work feel least visible right now, Nina?","description":"Finds the specific point where strong execution is not being seen or credited.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence bottleneck","name":"What’s getting in the way when you try to move things with stakeholders?","description":"Maps the practical blocker to influence rather than staying at the level of frustration.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support shape","name":"What kind of support from me would actually change your week?","description":"Lets her define the most useful manager help without assuming the fix.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision pressure","name":"Where do you want more decision-making room right now?","description":"Surfaces where she is over-constrained and wants more autonomy or air cover.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition landing","name":"How has the recognition for the last two features landed for you?","description":"Checks whether credit and visibility are actually reinforcing engagement.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-two-weeks focus","name":"Given what’s on your plate, what do you want to protect over the next two weeks?","description":"Forces a real trade-off around priorities and what should not get crowded out.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Steadier finish","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or friction without opening new topics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
